name: Cash Store
description_short: Cash Store Saginaw, Texas — Cash Store offers installment loans and prepaid card services at physical locations, with same-day funding available after i...
description_long:
Cash Store operates as a retail lending network with physical store locations, including the Houston location at 19734 Tomball Parkway. The company provides installment loans—unsecured personal loans repaid on a fixed schedule—along with ancillary financial services. Their Houston location maintains extended hours (10am-6pm weekdays, 10am-2pm Saturday) and has accumulated a 4.9-star rating from 212 Google reviews, with customer feedback highlighting staff professionalism and helpfulness.

Cash Store's primary service is unsecured installment loans marketed for major purchases, bill consolidation, and unexpected expenses. They also offer Netspend Prepaid Mastercard reloadable cards as an alternative banking product and provide retail refinancing/reloading options for existing customers. The loan approval process involves pre-qualification online, in-person document submission at a store location, underwriting review, and same-day funding upon acceptance of loan terms.

The company distinguishes itself through same-day funding capability and willingness to consider applicants with bad or no credit, though credit remains a factor in underwriting. Their in-store model allows for face-to-face interaction with loan officers and personalized service, as evidenced by customer reviews mentioning specific staff members by name. The Houston location specifically has generated recent positive reviews praising customer service quality.

A critical caveat is the absence of publicly displayed APR/interest rate information on the website, which is standard transparency in consumer lending. The loan terms, rates, and amounts are determined individually through underwriting and presented only after application. The website's reference to "Check 'n Go" maintenance messaging and the limited details about eligibility criteria or typical loan terms create uncertainty about the company's current operational status and borrowing conditions.

As a financial institution, this lender competes with both traditional banks and newer fintech personal loan lenders in the consumer lending space. Borrowers seeking personal loans for bad credit may find more flexible terms through online lenders, while those focused on simplifying payments may benefit from debt consolidation loans with fixed rates. For credit building, secured credit cards and credit builder loans offer structured paths to improvement. Credit monitoring services provide ongoing visibility into credit health, and credit counseling through nonprofit agencies can help consumers create sustainable budgeting plans. Many of these lenders offer installment loans with fixed monthly payments over 12 to 60 months, giving borrowers a clear payoff timeline.
pros: Same-day funding available after in-store approval and loan acceptance
Considers applicants with bad credit or no credit history (credit not automatic disqualifier)
Streamlined pre-qualification process available online before store visit
Extended retail hours including Saturday (10am-2pm) and weekday evenings until 6pm
High customer satisfaction rating (4.9/5 stars from 212 Google reviews)
Additional financial product offering (Netspend Prepaid Mastercard) for unbanked consumers
cons: No APR, interest rates, or loan terms disclosed on website—pricing information only available post-application
Requires active checking account in good standing for 30+ days (excludes unbanked consumers)
Website contains outdated maintenance message referencing 'Check 'n Go' system downtime with unclear current status
Limited transparency on approval criteria, typical loan amounts, or rate ranges
In-store application requirement eliminates full online lending option (pre-qualification only online)
best_for: Consumers with bad credit or limited credit history seeking personal installment loans
Houston-area borrowers needing same-day or next-day funding for unexpected expenses
Individuals seeking face-to-face lending consultation rather than fully automated online process
Existing Cash Store customers looking to refinance or reload current loans
diagnosis: Cash Store is best for credit-challenged consumers in the Houston area who can visit a physical location and need same-day installment financing without collateral. The primary caveat is complete lack of rate transparency on their website—borrowers must apply in-person to learn actual loan terms, making it impossible to comparison shop before visiting a store. Additionally, the website's maintenance messaging and limited operational details raise questions about current company status.
services: Unsecured installment loans for purchases, bill consolidation, and unexpected expenses
Same-day loan funding upon approval and acceptance
Retail refinancing and reloading for existing customers (phone-based)
In-store customer service and loan counseling
